acceptance_targets: [chapter_04-craft-001] Pass if a reader can state from the revised passage around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:143 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:171 what physical encounter has just happened and what Jonas is using against Nina, without relying on blurred lipstick alone. Fail if the scene still communicates the affair mainly through coy clothing disorder, generic silence, or abstract phrases like pressure without concrete aftermath.

[chapter_04-craft-002] Pass if the revised stairwell beat around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:79 contains no ellipsis-clipped dialogue fragments and still conveys Oscar's pressured work call through sound, cadence, or paraphrase. Fail if broken transcript-style lines remain on the page.

[chapter_04-prose-001] Pass if no more than two 'By the time' constructions remain in the chapter and the opening pickup, outbound drive, return to Belgravia, and closing engine-start beats each begin with a visibly different rhythm when read aloud. Fail if the chapter still repeats that hinge three or more times.

[chapter_04-prose-002] Pass if the revised passages around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:41 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:213 communicate three different kinds of silence and no more than one beat in the chapter uses a bare 'said nothing' construction. Fail if two or more near-identical silence markers remain.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can state from the revised passage around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:143 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:171 what physical encounter has just happened and what Jonas is using against Nina, without relying on blurred lipstick alone. Fail if the scene still communicates the affair mainly through coy clothing disorder, generic silence, or abstract phrases like pressure without concrete aftermath.
findings.problem: The Jonas sequence sanitizes Nina's intimacy and humiliation into tasteful traces and muffled abstraction. The chapter shows a wrong button, blurred lipstick, pills swallowed dry, then retreats to 'shapes of pressure' in the corridor instead of rendering concrete bodily or emotional consequence. Because this is the first time Beni sees what Nina's dependence on Jonas costs her, the scene pulls its punch at the exact moment it should become most legible.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the studio and corridor beats around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:143, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:151, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:171, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:175 so Beni's POV registers observable aftermath rather than tasteful implication. Keep the camera with Beni, but add concrete physical traces of the interrupted intimacy, at least one specific audible line of conflict, and clearer material stakes for the pills/catalogue exchange so Jonas's leverage and Nina's embarrassment are explicit on the page.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised stairwell beat around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:79 contains no ellipsis-clipped dialogue fragments and still conveys Oscar's pressured work call through sound, cadence, or paraphrase. Fail if broken transcript-style lines remain on the page.
findings.problem: The overheard Oscar fragments are rendered as ellipsis-clipped transcript shards. That violates the constitution's no-elliptical-clipping standard and briefly makes the chapter read like screenplay shorthand instead of embodied hearing.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace the clipped fragments at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:81, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:83, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:85 with either grammatically complete partial speech or narrated acoustic impression anchored in what Beni actually catches through the floorboards. If he cannot hear enough to parse the call, let the prose say so without printing ellipsis-bracketed fragments.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no more than two 'By the time' constructions remain in the chapter and the opening pickup, outbound drive, return to Belgravia, and closing engine-start beats each begin with a visibly different rhythm when read aloud. Fail if the chapter still repeats that hinge three or more times.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on 'By the time' five times as its default acceleration hinge. That repeated temporal preface gives the opening pickup, route math, return drive, and closing realization the same syntactic gait, which flattens otherwise sharp movement prose into a noticeable formula.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least three of the 'By the time' beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:49, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:111, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:235, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:289 so those transitions enter through different sentence structures rooted in action, sensation, or decision rather than the same temporal hinge.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:41 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:213 communicate three different kinds of silence and no more than one beat in the chapter uses a bare 'said nothing' construction. Fail if two or more near-identical silence markers remain.
findings.problem: Silence gets marked three times with near-identical 'X said nothing' construction. Because each moment carries a different pressure point—Nina's demand, Nina's post-studio fishing, and Beni's withholding in the car—the repeated formula compresses distinct social tactics into one generic beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the silence beats around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:41, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:197, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:213 so each refusal or pause is rendered through different embodied behavior or tactical delay: a wheel grip, mirror check, receipt-tearing watch, swallowed answer, or other local action that makes the silence specific to that exchange.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into asymmetry, embarrassment, appetite, and the material costs of intimacy. When an edge case appears, choose the version that preserves class pressure, erotic consequence, and bodily specificity rather than smoothing the scene into tasteful distance or soft-focus safety.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene naturally contains sexual awkwardness, bodily shame, class contempt, grief, or moral compromise, vague tasteful phrasing counts as a failed draft and must be rewritten toward concrete consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms should appear mainly for precision, social performance, or emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary chapter feel through scene count, dialogue density, movement versus waiting, and whether the turn comes from confrontation, discovery, aftermath, preparation, or unwanted intrusion. A nocturnal chauffeur chapter should not be followed by another chapter with the same pulse and architecture; counter hard chapters with domestic or reflective ones that still advance consequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, materially grounded, and alert to social register; imagery should emerge from labor, appetite, weather, and bodily memory rather than from decorative abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person anchored to Beni, with memory pressure and sensory bleed but no roaming omniscience.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed, road-tight paragraphs with slower observational passages that let smell, touch, and silence accumulate; keep sentence music controlled rather than showy.
